title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Delhi Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Delhi Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? IIT Delhi Global Group in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IIT Delhi Global Group:
IIT Delhi Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
